for_c_level: This failed run indicates high risk in the testing harness itself, blocking assessment of production readiness for AI memory sharing. No customer-facing claims can be validated or updated from prior runs. Overall posture remains unchanged, pending a successful re-run.
for_non_technical: This test run didn't produce any results because no reports were collected. As a result, we couldn't check if agents can reliably share memories with each other. It means we have no new information on whether the system works as expected.
for_sme: The campaign produced no scenario results, with the root cause likely in the CI harness failing to recover reports (harness_sha: 9d280e8e7ad5debcdfa38e38b86fdf12be9f99fe). All 35 requested scenarios (1 through 42, selective) were effectively skipped, impacting all primitives. No specific failure modes observed due to zero execution; investigate workflow_url for artifacts.
headline: Campaign failed: no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Debug and fix report recovery in the CI harness to ensure scenario outputs are captured.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a critical harness failure in report recovery, with no evidence of agent memory sharing functionality.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised due to failure in recovering reports, providing zero coverage across transport, framework, and primitives.
